package rulecoverage

func PositiveStringsReplaceAllForSingleChar() string {
    ruleID := "strings_replace_all_for_single_char"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`strings.ReplaceAll(s, \"x\", \"y\")` where both old and new are single characters"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
